title: Senior Teacher - MBD Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - MBD Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
MBD Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MBD Group:
MBD Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group!
